name: Oranges with Maple Carmel
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the oranges and slice or section them. Divide between two dessert dishes.
2. In a small saucepan, bring together boiling sugar, maple syrup, lemon juice, and water. Cook for 3 to 4 minutes until a thick syrup forms. Spoon over the oranges.
Makes 2 servings. Nutrient Value Per Serving: 218 calories, 1 g protein, 0 g fat, 56 g carbohydrate, 13 mg sodium, 0 mg cholesterol.
Exchanges: 3 3/4 fruit
